# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: "3.8"

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch:7.16.3
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      discovery.type: single-node
    networks:
      - elk-net

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash:7.16.3
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline.conf:ro
    networks:
      - elk-net

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana:7.16.3
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL: elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk-net

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.16.3
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL: elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk-net

networks:
  elk-net:
    driver: bridge
```
